titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 113: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 113. (A.R. No. of 2011-12.) MŌSAKKUḌI, KULATTUR TALUK, PUDUKKOTTAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south adhishṭāna, Ammaṇa-kāḷiyār temple.

It records that three persons Kāri Kēsavaṉ, Kāri Saḍaiyaṉ and Kāri Kaṇḍaṉ, the residents of Peruñchēvūr in Vaḍaśiṟuvāyil-nāḍu made a gift of some fallow land at Mosakuḍi after purchasing the same, to (the Jaina pontiff ?) Nandisēnan bhaṭārar also called Ārambanandi, the disciple of Pushpanandi-bhaṭārar of Perumpaḷḷi in Peruñjēvūrnāḍu as paḷḷichchandam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkki yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu vaṭaciṟuvāyil nāṭṭu peruñce
vūr Uṭaiyār kārikecuvaṉuṅ kāricaṭaiyaṉuṅ kārikaṇṭaṉu Ivvaṉaivom
Icaintu peruñcevūr nāṭṭār perumpaḷḷi puṣpaṇanti bhiṭārar māṇākkar nan=ticenan bhiṭārar
kkum Ivar vaḻi māṇākkarkkum mocakuṭi vayaliThe letter ‘li’ is engraved below the line.ṉ teṟkey kāṭu viḷaiyā veṇkaḷar kiṭantataṉai vilai ko
ṇṭu paḷḷiccantañ ceytu kuṭutta nilattukkuk kiḻpārkellai Ācciṉattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟke
llai neṭavoṭaikku vaṭakku vāḷuvamaṅkalat tellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai peru
ñcevūr niṉṟu taṭṭāṉ vayalukku poṉa(ṉa) vaḻiyiṉ melaippuḷic ceykkaruvukku
k kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ācciṉattiṟku teṟku pontu vaṭakiḻpāṟkellai ciṟutto
ṭṭattu teṉ karuvukkum teṟ(k)ku Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellai Uḷḷa Akappaṭṭa
kāṭu moṭaiyum kaḷamum UvaḻumRead uvarumUṭumpoṭiyāmai taviḻnta tepaperppaṭṭatu
muṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi paḷḷiccantamākac ceytu kuṭuttom Ārampanantikku
immūvom Inta dharmmarakṣittāṉ pādamentalai melaṉa §
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
